‚ú®‚ú®Comment‚Äùpatio‚Äù for links‚ú®‚ú®

These chairs are especially cozy, and I added a couple of ottomans because they‚Äôre so versatile. They work perfectly as a footrest when you want to relax, or extra seating when you have people over.
The fire table really becomes the focal point of the whole setup. Once that‚Äôs in place, everything instantly feels warm, inviting, and like a space you actually want to spend time in outside.

body:
After finding so much of our furniture on Wayfair, I‚Äôm excited to say I‚Äôm officially living my @wayfair Creator era ü§çüõãÔ∏è‚ú®

I‚Äôve gotten so many compliments from my story shares of our new home, so now they‚Äôre finally making their way onto my feed. :) And when it came to buying a couch, my husband and I definitely hit a few setbacks. Because of course‚Ä¶I had a whole wishlist. üòÖ

I wanted a modular (sectional pieces that can be rearranged anytime) in white or beige, washable, and with storage. Meanwhile, my husband‚Äôs only requirement? Affordable.

And guess what‚Ä¶ he actually found the one on @wayfair. üëÄ

Not only is it modular and cozy with that soft corduroy texture, but it has storage in every single seat (yes, every one, not just the ottoman!). Adjustable armrests, plush cushions, neutral vibes‚Ä¶ it instantly became the heart of our home.

Perfect for family movie nights, hosting friends, or hiding toys. ü§≠

Feeling so excited to share this find with you as a #WayfairCreator and trust me, this won‚Äôt be the last piece I style from Wayfair. ü§ç
.
.
.
.
Comment link to shop!

#Wayfair #livingroomfurniture #newhousedesign #homeorganizationtips #sectionalcouch

With four kids, that also means I‚Äôm constantly picking things up, moving furniture, and trying to keep everything organized while still making the house feel elevated.

Multifunctional pieces make such a difference. Storage ottomans for hiding toys, nesting tables that move easily when we have people over, and lighting, stools, and small details that pull the space together.

I was able to find everything for this space on Wayfair, which has really become my one stop shop for everything home.

Also perfect timing because their Cyber Week deals are happening March 19th through March 23rd!!

body:
Sometimes it‚Äôs not about adding more space‚Ä¶ it‚Äôs about using the space you already have ü§ç

Our small round breakfast table just wasn‚Äôt working anymore for our family of five, and the keeping room off our kitchen was barely being used. So I reimagined the layout and combined both areas into one large, functional breakfast space that finally fits our everyday life and when we‚Äôre entertaining.

Every piece in this makeover is from @wayfair ‚Äî from the dining table and chairs to the rug, black sideboards, and the brushed gold chandelier that completely transformed the space ‚ú® The difference in how this room functions is everything.

If you‚Äôre feeling stuck with a space in your home, let this be your sign to rethink the layout.

body:
Durable, stylish, and perfect for bringing everyone together‚Äîthis is outdoor living made easy.
This outdoor furniture layout found @wayfair makes gatherings feel effortless and welcoming. The pieces selected are comfortable, durable, and offer a variety of seating options to fit every type of gathering.
This once large and empty space now feels like the perfect spot for lively weekend BBQs, or a tranquil morning coffee.
My favorite pieces are the hanging chairs where you can relax and view the ocean and the floating shelves used to display your favorite outdoor dishware for gatherings. For all these featured furniture and decor items visit my Wayfair storefront in bio for direct links.

body:
I used to save the ‚Äúpretty‚Äù things. The good candles. The nice dishes. The special linens. I‚Äôd tell myself I was waiting for the right moment.

But here‚Äôs the truth: this is the moment.

You don‚Äôt create a beautiful home just to look at it. You create it to live in it. To use it. To enjoy it on an ordinary Tuesday.

Light the candle.
Use the good plates.
Sit in the room you worked so hard to design.

A cozy, intentional home isn‚Äôt about perfection ‚Äî it‚Äôs about participation. It‚Äôs about letting your space support your everyday life, not just your guests.

Live in your house.
Use the pretty stuff. #wayfairelevate #wayfaircreator #ad @wayfair #CozyHome #charlottedesigner

body:
Sometimes it‚Äôs not about adding more space‚Ä¶ it‚Äôs about using the space you already have ü§ç

Our small round breakfast table just wasn‚Äôt working anymore for our family of five, and the keeping room off our kitchen was barely being used. So I reimagined the layout and combined both areas into one large, functional breakfast space that finally fits our everyday life and when we‚Äôre entertaining.

Every piece in this makeover is from @wayfair ‚Äî from the dining table and chairs to the rug, black sideboards, and the brushed gold chandelier that completely transformed the space ‚ú® The difference in how this room functions is everything.

If you‚Äôre feeling stuck with a space in your home, let this be your sign to rethink the layout.

‚ú® Save this for layout inspiration
‚ú® Comment SHOP if you want the links to shop this room, or find everything linked in my Wayfair storefront (link in bio)
